Syster Core Bundle
==================

This directory is packaged into the distributable build.

Recommended layout for local AI bundle:
- gethes/vendor/syster_core/ollama/ollama.exe
- gethes/vendor/syster_core/ollama/lib/*
- gethes/vendor/syster_core/models/manifests/*
- gethes/vendor/syster_core/models/blobs/*

Use packaging/prepare_syster_core_bundle.ps1 to populate this folder from a development machine.
